---
title: "How MEJC Supports ITC Students Beyond the Classroom"
date: 2025-11-21
description: "A quick overview of workshops, mentoring, and peer support led by MEJC."
image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80"
categories: [Students, ITC]
---

From webinars to alumni mentorship, MEJC gives ITC students real context on how engineering education connects to field practice.
